previousFeature.notes: All 5 dsq stories (dsq.1.5, dsq.1, dsq.2, dsq.3, dsq.4) signed off at DoR. Inner loop was superseded by mfc.1 which replaced the scrape-first architecture. dsq stories tests were rewritten as part of mfc.1 commit d793217.

checkpoint.contextAtWrite: mfc.1 definition-of-done complete. 10/10 ACs satisfied. npm test 0 failures (25 mfc.1 tests + 7 rewritten files). DoD artefact written. pipeline-state.json updated with mfc.1 feature (stage=definition-of-done, dodStatus=complete, M3 on-track). M1 and M2 not-yet-measured. Deviations D1/D2 recorded (minor). Port 3000 blocked by stale node process; live smoke test pending.
checkpoint.resumeInstruction: mfc.1 DoD is complete. Next: (1) Kill stale node process on port 3000 (Get-Process -Name node | Stop-Process -Force) then start server (node --env-file=.env src/web-ui/server.js) and run live smoke test per artefacts/2026-05-05-web-ui-model-first-chat/verification-scripts/mfc.1-verification.md AC1-AC6. (2) After first live discovery session, measure M1 and M2 and update benefit-metric.md. (3) Consider /discovery for the next feature or /improve for a retrospective.
pendingActions: Kill stale node process on port 3000: Get-Process -Name node | Stop-Process -Force — then run node --env-file=.env src/web-ui/server.js
Run live smoke test: open browser at http://localhost:3000/skills, start a discovery session, verify redirect to /chat (AC1), initial message visible (AC3), answers accepted (AC4)
After first live session completes with artefact: measure M1 (Discovery artefact template conformance rate) and update artefacts/2026-05-05-web-ui-model-first-chat/benefit-metric.md M1 evidence field
After 5 live sessions: measure M2 (Model-driven question adaptation) and update benefit-metric.md M2 evidence field
